pi_items.source: Verified by task instructions and setup_task.sh configuration.
Geospatial intersection analysis on Natural Earth 110m shapefiles confirmed all 7 listed countries contain populated places and should not be present in the output isolated territories shapefile.

GeoPandas spatial join on the actual Natural Earth 110m datasets shows exactly 15 countries are disjoint from populated places. The claimed range (30-90) appears to be incorrectly ported from the 50m dataset.
GeoPandas spatial join on the actual Natural Earth 110m datasets shows exactly 15 countries are disjoint from populated places, contradicting the expected maximum of 90.

privileged_info_summary: The task identifies countries disjoint from populated places using public Natural Earth 110m data. The verified expected output contains exactly 15 countries, contradicting the claimed range of 30-90 (which incorrectly assumes the Natural Earth 50m dataset). The forbidden countries list correctly identifies countries that contain populated places and must be excluded from the selection.
